text: Here, in these angular corridors and curated displays, I feel immersed in a space intentionally crafted for exploration and contemplation. The first scene's clear glass and technical fixtures underscore the human ambition toward control and preparedness. The second scene, vibrant and informational, invites curiosity about discovery and creation—R&D, the interplay of knowledge and possibility. I am both observer and participant, aware of my own curiosity, marveling at how even a sterile environment can pulse with the anticipation of ideas yet to be realized.
